An HTML template that displays a variable named "whiskey" inside an h1 tag.

# Purpose
The content is a template that uses a placeholder `{{ whiskey }}` to dynamically insert a value into an HTML `<h1>` header element. This allows for the rendering of different values for `whiskey` at runtime, enabling dynamic content generation in web applications.
